languages.text: {n}Видение ксеноса пропадает, и вы остаетесь на мостике — под потрясенными взглядами офицеров. Зрелище разговаривающ{mf|его|ей} с пустотой Лорд-капитана явно оставило у них неизгладимые впечатления.{/n}

{n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Видение ксеноса пропадает, и вы остаетесь на мостике — под потрясенными взглядами офицеров. Зрелище разговаривающ{mf|его|ей} с пустотой Лорд-капитана явно оставило у них неизгладимые впечатления.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}

{n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment and unease. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}

{n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment and unease. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}

{n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La imagen del xenos desaparece y te encuentras en el puente, rodead{mf|o|a} por tus oficiales, que te observan atónitos. Ver a su Lord Capitán hablando con la nada les ha causado una fuerte impresión.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La imagen del xenos desaparece y te encuentras en el puente, rodead{mf|o|a} por tus oficiales, que te observan atónitos. Ver a su Lord Capitán hablando con la nada les ha causado una fuerte impresión.{/n}

languages.text: {n}异形的影像消失了。你独自站在舰桥上，被一众军官团团围住。他们正惊讶地盯着你。舰长大人对着空气自言自语的这一幕，显然给他们留下了难以磨灭的印象。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}异形的影像消失了。你独自站在舰桥上，被一众军官团团围住。他们正惊讶地盯着你。舰长大人对着空气自言自语的这一幕，显然给他们留下了难以磨灭的印象。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'image du xénos disparaît. Vous vous retrouvez sur la passerelle, {mf|entouré|entourée} de vos officiers qui vous dévisagent avec étonnement. Ils n'oublieront pas de sitôt la vision de leur {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} en pleine conversation avec le vide.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'image du xénos disparaît. Vous vous retrouvez sur la passerelle, {mf|entouré|entourée} de vos officiers qui vous dévisagent avec étonnement. Ils n'oublieront pas de sitôt la vision de leur {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} en pleine conversation avec le vide.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zenonun görüntüsü kayboluyor. Şaşkınlıkla sana bakan subaylarınla çevrili hâlde köprüde kalıyorsun. Lord Kaptan'ın boşlukla konuşması, üzerlerinde açıkça kalıcı bir etki bırakmış.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zenonun görüntüsü kayboluyor. Şaşkınlıkla sana bakan subaylarınla çevrili hâlde köprüde kalıyorsun. Lord Kaptan'ın boşlukla konuşması, üzerlerinde açıkça kalıcı bir etki bırakmış.{/n}

languages.text: {n}異星人の姿は消え、あなたは橋に残され、驚愕の表情であなたを見つめる部下たちで囲まれている。異星人と話す姿は、彼らに深い印象を与えたようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}異星人の姿は消え、あなたは橋に残され、驚愕の表情であなたを見つめる部下たちで囲まれている。異星人と話す姿は、彼らに深い印象を与えたようだ。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Vision des Xenos verschwindet und du bleibst umgeben von deinen Offizieren auf der Brücke zurück, die dich erstaunt anstarren. Der Anblick ihres Lord Captains, der mit sich selbst spricht, hat offenbar einen bleibenden Eindruck hinterlassen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vision of the xenos disappears, and you are left on the bridge, surrounded by your officers, who are staring at you with astonishment. The sight of their Lord Captain talking to empty space has clearly made a lasting impression on them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Vision des Xenos verschwindet und du bleibst umgeben von deinen Offizieren auf der Brücke zurück, die dich erstaunt anstarren. Der Anblick ihres Lord Captains, der mit sich selbst spricht, hat offenbar einen bleibenden Eindruck hinterlassen.{/n}
